TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nate_Archibald, title = Nate_Archibald, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nate_Archibald} }

S.FORM: Nate Archibald sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1948, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 9, Nate Archibald, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Nate Archibald sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1948, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 9, Nate Archibald, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: nate arʦ~ʨħiβal* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, nate arʦ~ʨħiβal*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
